info.title: Lucent API
info.description: Lucent 后端 API 文档

password.description: 密码（8-32位，需包含大小写字母和数字）

email.description: 邮箱地址，第三方账号可能为空

code.description: 邮箱验证码（与密码二选一）

email.description: 邮箱地址，第三方账号可能为空

callbackUri.description: 授权完成后的客户端回跳地址。桌面端支持 loopback 地址，Web 端支持可信 CORS origin 下的 /login/oauth/wechat。
客户端回跳地址。桌面端 loopback 或可信 Web 回调登录时返回。

password.description: 新密码（8-32位，需包含大小写字母和数字）

email.description: Provider email when the provider exposes one.

emailVerifiedAt.description: Provider email verification time in ISO 8601.

email.description: Account email. OAuth-only accounts may not have one.

emailVerifiedAt.description: Account email verification time in ISO 8601.

hasPassword.description: Whether the account has a local password.

linkedIdentities.description: Linked third-party identities without provider user ids.

nickname.description: Display nickname. Send an empty string to clear it.

avatar.description: Avatar URL. Send an empty string to clear it.

newPassword.description: 新密码（8-32位，需包含大小写字母和数字）

indication.example: Used for pain, fever, and inflammation.

matchedBy.description: Which fields matched the current query.

age.description: Age derived from birth date. Null when birth date is missing.

onboardingCompleted.description: Whether the onboarding flow has been completed.

activeAllergyCount.description: Number of active allergy records returned in this payload.

conditionCount.description: Number of condition records returned in this payload.

currentMedicineCount.description: Number of current medicine records returned in this payload.

missingCoreProfileFields.description: Missing core profile fields that the frontend can use for onboarding nudges.

PregnancyState.description: Pregnancy state for personalized medical guidance.

LactationState.description: Lactation state for personalized medical guidance.

pregnancyState.description: Pregnancy state for personalized medical guidance.

lactationState.description: Lactation state for personalized medical guidance.

onboardingCompletedAt.description: When the onboarding flow was completed.

extras.description: Sparse profile extensions stored in jsonb.

isActive.description: Whether the allergy is currently active.

extras.description: Sparse allergy extensions stored in jsonb.
Sparse condition extensions stored in jsonb.

MedicineSource.description: Upstream source used to anchor this medicine.

source.description: Upstream source used to anchor this medicine.

displayName.description: Display name shown to the user.

isCurrent.description: Whether the medicine is currently active.

note.example: Use only when needed for headaches

sourcePayload.description: Original source payload stored in jsonb.

locale.description: Preferred locale. Use null or empty string to clear and follow the client default.

timezone.description: Preferred timezone. Use null or empty string to clear.

unitSystem.description: Preferred unit system. Use null to clear.

sexAtBirth.description: Sex assigned at birth. Use null to clear.

heightCm.description: Height in centimeters. Use null to clear.

pregnancyState.description: Pregnancy state for personalized medical guidance. Use null to clear.

lactationState.description: Lactation state for personalized medical guidance. Use null to clear.

bloodType.description: Blood type. Use null to clear.

onboardingCompleted.description: Set true to complete onboarding (sets completedAt when missing). Set false to clear onboarding completion.

recordedAt.description: When this allergy was recorded in ISO 8601 format.

reaction.description: Recorded reaction. Use null to clear.

note.description: User note for the allergy. Use null to clear.

recordedAt.description: When this allergy was recorded in ISO 8601 format.

isActive.description: Whether the allergy is currently active.

diagnosedAt.description: Diagnosis date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use null to clear.

note.description: User note for the condition. Use null to clear.

source.description: Upstream source used to anchor this medicine.

sourceRefId.description: Source-specific reference id. Required for drugbank and cn sources.

displayName.description: Display name shown to the user.

note.example: Use only when needed for headaches

displayName.description: Display name shown to the user.

strengthText.description: Strength text. Use null to clear.

doseText.description: Dose text. Use null to clear.

route.description: Administration route. Use null to clear.

startedAt.description: Start date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use null to clear.

endedAt.description: End date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Use null to clear.

note.description: User note. Use null to clear.
note.example: Use only when needed for headaches

isCurrent.description: Whether the medicine is currently active.

total.description: Total records for the date (before pagination).

count.description: Count of records for this kind on the given date.

latest.description: Most recent record of this kind.

uploadUrl.description: Signed PUT URL for direct COS upload.

headers.description: Headers that must be sent with the PUT upload.

publicUrl.description: Optional public/CDN URL when TENCENT_COS_PUBLIC_BASE_URL is configured.

maxSizeBytes.description: Maximum accepted upload size in bytes.

objectKey.description: Object storage key, stable across signed URL rotations.

publicUrl.description: Optional public or already-signed display URL.

attachments.description: Attachment metadata. File upload itself is handled separately.

title.description: Short label. Use null to clear.

value.description: Measured value. Use null to clear.

unit.description: Unit label. Use null to clear.

note.description: Free-text note. Use null to clear.

attachments.description: Replacement attachment metadata list. Omit to keep existing attachments; send [] to clear.

daysOfWeek.description: Weekday numbers 0-6. Null means every day.

startDate.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format when the reminder starts.

endDate.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format when the reminder ends.

daysOfWeek.description: Weekday numbers 0-6, where null means every day.

startDate.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format when the reminder starts.

endDate.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format when the reminder ends.

daysOfWeek.description: Weekday numbers 0-6, where null means every day.

startDate.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format when the reminder starts. Use null to clear.

endDate.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format when the reminder ends. Use null to clear.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp for the static reference data refresh.

date.description: Target date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to backend current day when omitted.

dataSharingConsent.description: Consent to share anonymized data for research.
Consent to share anonymized data for research.

available.description: Whether the resource is currently available.

updatedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of last reference data revision.

requestedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the request was created.
